name: Actor
description: Skilled at mimicry and dramatic performance.

name: Alert
description: Exceptional awareness and quick reactions.

name: Athlete
description: Improved physical training and mobility.

name: Charger
description: Make powerful attacks after rushing toward enemies.

name: Crossbow Expert
description: Master the use of crossbows in close combat.

name: Defensive Duelist
description: Use finesse weapons to parry incoming attacks.

name: Dual Wielder
description: Fight effectively with a weapon in each hand.

name: Dungeon Delver
description: Expert at detecting and surviving dungeon hazards.

name: Durable
description: Recover more effectively from injuries.

name: Elemental Adept
description: Specialize in spells of a chosen damage type.

name: Grappler
description: Excel at wrestling and restraining foes.

name: Great Weapon Master
description: Deliver devastating attacks with heavy weapons.

name: Healer
description: Use healer's kits to restore additional health.

name: Heavily Armored
description: Gain proficiency with heavy armor.

name: Heavy Armor Master
description: Reduce damage while wearing heavy armor.

name: Inspiring Leader
description: Bolster allies with inspiring speeches.

name: Keen Mind
description: Possess an exceptional memory and sense of direction.

name: Lightly Armored
description: Gain proficiency with light armor.

name: Linguist
description: Master additional languages and create ciphers.

name: Lucky
description: Manipulate fate through extraordinary luck.

name: Mage Slayer
description: Specialize in combating spellcasters.

name: Magic Initiate
description: Learn a small amount of magic from a chosen class.

name: Martial Adept
description: Learn Battle Master combat maneuvers.

name: Medium Armor Master
description: Use medium armor with greater effectiveness.

name: Mobile
description: Move swiftly across the battlefield.

name: Moderately Armored
description: Gain proficiency with medium armor and shields.

name: Mounted Combatant
description: Excel at fighting while mounted.

name: Observant
description: Notice details others often miss.

name: Polearm Master
description: Master the use of polearms in combat.

name: Resilient
description: Gain proficiency in saving throws tied to a chosen ability.

name: Ritual Caster
description: Learn to cast ritual spells from a ritual book.

name: Savage Attacker
description: Strike with unusually forceful melee attacks.

name: Sentinel
description: Prevent enemies from escaping your reach.

name: Sharpshooter
description: Excel with ranged weapon attacks.

name: Shield Master
description: Use shields offensively and defensively.

name: Skilled
description: Gain proficiency in additional skills or tools.

name: Skulker
description: Hide effectively in dim light and shadows.

name: Spell Sniper
description: Enhance the range and precision of spell attacks.

name: Tavern Brawler
description: Fight effectively with improvised weapons.

name: Tough
description: Gain exceptional durability and stamina.

name: War Caster
description: Maintain concentration and cast spells in combat.

name: Weapon Master
description: Gain proficiency with additional weapons.

name: Bountiful Luck
description: Share your extraordinary luck with allies.

name: Dragon Fear
description: Channel draconic presence to frighten enemies.

name: Dragon Hide
description: Develop tougher scales and natural weapons.

name: Drow High Magic
description: Learn additional innate drow magic.

name: Dwarven Fortitude
description: Recover vitality while defending yourself.

name: Elven Accuracy
description: Strike with remarkable precision when you have advantage.
